\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Implementation of a minimal 3D BSP tree for triangle meshes. 

Implementation notes\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item The splitting plane tolerance is controlled by {\ttfamily BSPTHRESH}.
\item Memory ownership\+: triangles referenced by {\ttfamily \doxylink{structbspPolygon_ab60b6f1844092d928472944666981730}{bsp\+Polygon\+::origin}} are owned elsewhere; this module only allocates/deallocates {\ttfamily \doxylink{structbspPolygon}{bsp\+Polygon}} wrappers created during splitting. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{Bsp3D_8cpp_source}{Bsp3\+D.\+cpp}}.
